items.title: Nigeria arrests former minister in hiding after corruption conviction
items.dek: The former power minister was sentenced to 75 years in jail in absentia earlier this month.
items.body: The former power minister was sentenced to 75 years in jail in absentia earlier this month.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump's Greenland envoy faces uphill battle on mission to make 'friends'
items.dek: Jeff Landry's visit to the territory, a semi-autonomous part of Denmark, has touched a nerve among some Greenlanders.
items.body: Jeff Landry's visit to the territory, a semi-autonomous part of Denmark, has touched a nerve among some Greenlanders.
